title: lortetia vespertilio
intro: Lortetia vespertilio, also known as evening primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. The medicinal properties of Lortetia vespertilia are attributed to its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of using Lortetia vespertilio include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and alleviating symptoms of eczema, menopause, and other hormonal imbalances. Lortetia vespertilio is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, oil, and tea, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
